text: Starter plan: $29/month (billed monthly) or $23/month (billed annually). Includes up to 5 users and 10GB storage.
Starter plan is now $39/month (billed monthly) or $31/month (billed annually). Includes up to 5 users and 10GB storage.
Starter plan includes: email support, 5 team members, 10GB storage, API access (100 req/min), and standard integrations.
Upgrade from Starter to Pro at any time. Prorated credit applied automatically.
Starter plan is best for small teams and individual creators getting started.
Pro plan: $99/month (billed monthly) or $79/month (billed annually). Includes 25 users, 100GB storage, and phone support.
Pro plan updated pricing: $119/month (billed monthly) or $95/month (billed annually). Includes 25 users, 100GB storage, and priority phone support.
Pro plan users receive priority support with a guaranteed 4-hour response time.
Enterprise plans start at $299/month for organizations with up to 100 users. Custom pricing available for larger teams.
Enterprise pricing starts at $499/month for organizations with 100 or more users. Includes dedicated support, SSO, and custom SLAs.
Contact sales@example.com for a custom enterprise quote and demo.
Enterprise plan includes a 99.9% uptime SLA with financial penalties for breaches.
Volume discounts start at 10% for 500+ seats and 20% for 1000+ seats.
Annual billing saves up to 20% compared to month-to-month pricing.
All plans include a 14-day free trial. No credit card required to start.
